# tenableio_scans (Data Source)

Retrieves a list of scan configurations from Tenable.io.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `folder_id` (Number) Filter scans by folder ID.

### Read-Only

- `scans` (Attributes List) List of scans. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--scans))

<a id="nestedatt--scans"></a>
### Nested Schema for `scans`

Read-Only:

- `creation_date` (Number)
- `description` (String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `folder_id` (Number)
- `id` (Number)
- `last_modification_date` (Number)
- `name` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `type` (String)
- `uuid` (String)
